mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, name, phone, nickname, last_login_method, role, status, joined_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, 'EMAIL', 'USER', 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, email, password, name, phone, nickname, role, status FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
